primitives.includes: any organism: plant, animal, fungus, microbe

primitives.excludes: implies zo unless combined with mu; excludes non-intentional life
transformation, change of state, growth — use be/de compounds

primitives.includes: deliberate acts, operations, exertion of will
physical arrangement, organization, system, spatial form
idea, plan, model, logic, knowledge, mental representation
piece, element, member of a whole
bilateral transformation events; reciprocal exchange; events where two participants are simultaneously modified
primitives.excludes: static relation (use ne); directed causation (use go/du); single-participant change (use be/de/ki); energetic resonance state (use ne-ra)
containment/interior (use ko), time, abstract logical space

primitives.includes: raw sensory awareness: sight, hearing, touch, detection
primitives.excludes: processed knowledge (use to), encoded signal (use si)

primitives.includes: any encoded information: symbol, sign, data, language, code
primitives.excludes: raw unencoded perception (use se), interpreted meaning (use to)

primitives.includes: power, charge, capacity to cause change, kinetic force
primitives.excludes: thermal state of matter (use ha), structure, information, motion itself

primitives.includes: temperature, warmth, coldness as matter-property, thermal intensity
primitives.excludes: energy as force (use ra), light (use lu), sound (use so)

primitives.includes: inward-facing felt tone of organism state: mood substrate, arousal level, valence of internal chemistry, pre-conceptual affect
primitives.excludes: named emotions (use process constructions), external sensory detection (use se), conceptual knowledge (use to)

families.name: Z — Living organism · Perception · Mutual exchange

entries.gloss: use / operate a tool or artifact
epistemic ruling crossing to public force
the world, inhabited realm of human persons
garment, clothing, value-artifact worn on body
liberation / liberator, place-motion (⚠️ form-shares W087 — pending resolution)
self-originating relation / "I am who I am"
body, physical matter of a living being
knowledge of truth; knowledge of Tonesu; the language in use
meta-truth; analytic knowledge of Tonesu; theory of the language
magic; the systematic, disciplined practice of directed force
abjuration; containment-limit-change; magic of maintaining protective barriers
conjuration; spatial-emergence-change; magic of making things emerge into new places
divination; pattern-perception-change; magic of transforming perception to access hidden knowledge
enchantment; willed-affect-shift; magic of intentionally altering affect and will
evocation; force-manifestation-change; magic of channeling and releasing raw force
illusion; quality-perception-change; magic of crafting apparent properties
necromancy; death-organism-change; magic of transformation through and across death
transmutation; quality-change; fundamental alteration of properties
